name: ASP Isotopes Inc.
content: ASP Isotopes Inc. is a pre-commercial stage advanced materials company focused on the development of technology and processes for the production of isotopes for use in multiple industries. The company utilizes its proprietary Aerodynamic Separation Process (ASP) technology to enrich isotopes for medical, industrial, and energy applications, including the production of High-Assay Low-Enriched Uranium (HALEU) for next-generation nuclear reactors. ASP Isotopes aims to provide a more efficient and cost-effective method for isotope enrichment compared to traditional centrifuge or laser-based technologies, addressing critical supply chain needs in the global nuclear and healthcare sectors.
